design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Toggle Required. Dark Mode = Deep Work/Coding environment. Light Mode = HR/Resume focus.
anti_patterns: No rounded-xl 'soft' SaaS cards - go sharper
No boring Bootstrap grids - use Bento layouts

typography.installation: Imports will be handled via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS

layout_system.spacing_scale: Relaxed - use p-6, p-8 for containers

buttons.default: h-10 px-4 py-2 bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 inline-flex items-center justify-center whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium ring-offset-background transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50

inputs.style: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-muted-foreground is readable against backgrounds
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings
accessibility.aria_labels: Required for all icon-only buttons (Record, Play, etc.)

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: UPDATE /app/frontend/src/index.css to import Plus Jakarta Sans and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
MODIFY /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js to set font families: sans: ['Plus Jakarta Sans', ...], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', ...]
OVERRIDE Shadcn radius: Set --radius to 0.3rem or 0.5rem in index.css (do not use 1rem/0.75rem). We want a sharper 'tactical' look.
DASHBOARD LAYOUT: Use the Bento Grid (Mode A) strategy. Do not just stack cards vertically.
INTERVIEW ROOM: Split screen. Left side = Question/Script (Scrollable). Right side = Video Feed (Sticky/Fixed).
VIDEO CONTROLS: Use a floating glassmorphism bar at the bottom of the video feed.
RECORDING STATE: When recording, show a pulsing red indicator and a real-time waveform if possible (or a simulated CSS animation).
AI FEEDBACK: Present feedback in a clean, structured list (Strength, Weakness, Suggestion) using distinctive icons/colors.
THEME TOGGLE: Place prominently in the nav bar. Default to Dark Mode if the user's system preference is unknown.
All functional elements must have data-testid attributes.
universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Don't center align the app container.
